videos.title: Paper Thin Speaker Without Diaphragm Test
videos.description: Experimental testing of the Flat Copper Winding (FCW) speaker prototype without the diaphragm to observe direct electromagnetic coil vibration and validate the proof-of-concept.

videos.title: Flat Copper Winding Complete Demonstration
videos.description: Complete demonstration of the Flat Copper Winding (FCW) architecture, highlighting the electromagnetic working principle and overall speaker prototype.

videos.title: Flat Copper Winding Fabrication
videos.description: Demonstration of manually winding the Flat Copper Winding (FCW) coil used as the primary electromagnetic actuator of the paper-thin speaker.

videos.title: Paper Thin Speaker Complete Setup
videos.description: Complete overview of the assembled paper-thin speaker prototype including the FCW coil, diaphragm, terminals, magnetic assembly, and testing setup.

videos.title: Paper Thin Speaker Dimension Measurement
videos.description: Measurement and inspection of the physical dimensions, thickness, and compact structure of the paper-thin speaker prototype.

videos.title: Paper Thin Speaker Performance Test
videos.description: Functional testing of the completed Flat Copper Winding speaker prototype to evaluate audible sound generation and overall operation.

thumbnail.src: /images/paper speaker/PAPER_SPEAKER_VERSION 2 TESTING AND COMPLETE PROJECT ON TABLE.jpg
thumbnail.caption: Paper Thin Speaker Performance Test

videos.title: Paper Thin Speaker With Diaphragm Test
videos.description: Demonstration of the completed speaker operating with the diaphragm installed, validating the full Flat Copper Winding speaker architecture.
